description:
Audit a veteran's service-connected disabilities in the VistA database using the YDBGui interface. Locate a patient with 'Rated Disabilities' (stored in the ^DPT Patient file, Node .372) and record the Patient's Name, the Disability Name (cross-referenced from ^DIC(31)), and the Disability Percentage. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/disability_audit.txt with the following exact format:

Patient: [Patient Name]
Disability: [Disability Name]
Percentage: [Percentage]%
